Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const k=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('entries:',k.length\); console.log\('sample:', JSON.stringify\(d[k[0]], null, 2\).substring\(0,300\)\)")
